title: hyptis mutabilis
intro: Hyptis mutabilis, also known as False Hyssop or Mexican Tea, is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hyptis mutabilis include relieving respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, as well as treating digestive issues, skin problems, and fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
